name: bork
description: My Original and Collected skills, agents, commands, and hooks. Writing, reviewing, planning, QA, shipping.

interface.shortDescription: My Original and Collected skills, agents, commands, and hooks.
interface.longDescription: Bork bundles my Original skills (commit writing, SQL formatting, plan writing, humanize, council, red-pen, prototype, handoff, agents-md-lint, review-security) with Collected skills ported from upstream sources like gstack (plan-session, plan-deep-review, plan-eng-review, plan-design-review, plan-devex-review, autoplan, review, qa, qa-only, design-review, design-consultation, investigate, ship, document-release). Includes supporting agents, commands, and hooks across the development cycle.
defaultPrompt: Plan this feature with /plan-session, then run /autoplan to vet it
Review this branch with /review before I ship it
QA this feature and fix what you find
